name: Ricrac
description: A fat ric-rac zigzag ribbon woven across the grid, re-weaving its turns each seed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(0 30%, 30% 0, 50% 20%, 70% 0, 100% 30%, 70% 60%, 100% 100%, 70% 100%, 50% 80%, 30% 100%, 0 100%, 30% 60%); clip-path: polygon(0 30%, 30% 0, 50% 20%, 70% 0, 100% 30%, 70% 60%, 100% 100%, 70% 100%, 50% 80%, 30% 100%, 0 100%, 30% 60%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
